designIntent.product_name:
Create a pixel art sprite sheet with exactly 4 frames in a single horizontal row. Each frame shows a cute seal walking to the right in a smooth looping animation. The seal is side-facing (right), with consistent size and alignment in every frame.

Each frame should look like a 32x32 retro game sprite, with clean outlines, minimal colors, and clear silhouette. Ensure even spacing between frames and no vertical stacking. Transparent background only. No additional objects, no text, no borders.
